name: Overflowing Evil Tide
outcome: With sucking, moving ooze surrounding you from every angle and rising higher by the second, you soon find yourself almost entirely entrapped in a veritable bed of wicked gooey comfort, the threefold villainesses purring in delight as your arms and legs sink into them almost to the point of total immobilization, your complete confinement drawing closer by the moment...
miss: With sucking, moving ooze surrounding you from every angle and rising higher by the second, the threefold villainesses threaten to immerse you even further into wicked gooey comfort, but you manage to shake off their syrupy entanglement!
